episodes.title: Epstein Investigation | Former models share their stories
episodes.description:
Former models Ebba P. Karlsson and Thysia Huisman say they were sexually assaulted by men linked to Jeffrey Epstein. They're now speaking out and fighting for justice for survivors everywhere.

Ebba is also the co-founder of VictoriousAngels.com, a global collective whose mission is to support, encourage and protect all victims of model industry abuse. #Heat #Epstein #Victim #abuse #survivors #models

episodes.title: Epstein Investigation | Victims share their stories
episodes.description:
Two former models, Ebba P. Karlsson and Thysia Huisman, who have accused men associated with Jeffrey Epstein of sexual assault share their stories as they seek justice. 

Ebba P. Karlsson is also the co-founder of VictoriousAngels.com, a global collective of abuse survivors of Gerald Marie and Jean Luc Brunel whose mission is to support, encourage and protect all victims of model industry abuse.

episodes.title: Epstein Case: Redacted Names and Victim Protection Failures
episodes.description:
Newly released court documents connected to the Jeffrey Epstein case are fueling renewed public anger and debate. Large sections remain redacted, and powerful associates are still shielded from full scrutiny. Attorney Gloria Allred, who represents multiple victims, raises serious concerns about accountability, victim treatment, and the continued secrecy around influential figures linked to the case.
#EpsteinFiles #JeffreyEpstein #GloriaAllred #CourtDocuments #JusticeSystem #Transparency #VictimsRights #LegalAccountability #AmericasNow #features

episodes.title: Epstein saga sheds light on child sex trafficking
episodes.description:
The case of Jeffrey Epstein raised alarms about the prospect of a sprawling sex-trafficking ring operating in plain sight for years - and what that said about power, privilege and accountability in America. Prosecutors say Epstein exploited wealth and influence to prey on vulnerable young women and girls, but experts say the case shows just how prevalent child exploitation is and how perpetrators can often get off with a slap on the wrist. Toni Waterman has more.

episodes.title: The Heat: Epstein Investigation
episodes.description:
A stunning development in the Epstein investigation, the UK’s former Prince Andrew has been arrested on suspicion of misconduct in public office. 

The arrest comes months after Andrew was stripped of his titles and forced out of his royal residence over ties to convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.  #Heat #UK #PrinceAndrew #Epstein #monarchy #windsorpalace 

Guests: 

Imani Cheers is a Cultural Curator and Professor of Digital Storytelling at George Washington University.
Richard Mullaney is the Executive Director of the Haskel Public Policy Institute at Jacksonville University. Jadan Horyn is a political analyst.
Jonathan Lis is a journalist and political commentator.

episodes.title: The Epstein Money Trail & Ongoing Fallout
episodes.description:
At the time of his death, U.S financier and convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein was worth around $600 million. His links to numerous high-profile people offered him unusual access and influence. So, who were those figures and how did Epstein build up so much wealth? CGTN’s Sean Callebs speaks to Mindy Gulati, the CEO of Fundamental Advisory and a criminal defense attorney about he amassed his wealth and ongoing fallout #bizshow #epstein #maxwell #epsteinvictims #princeandrew #finance #politics #business 

0:00 Ongoing fallout from the Epstein files
0:23 How Jeffrey Epstein built his wealth
0:52 Private financial management for billionaires
1:19 Les Wexner, Leon Black and key financial ties
1:40 Opaque services and complex money flows
2:00 Influence, power and financial leverage
2:16 Power of attorney and elite relationships
2:43 Why associates are distancing themselves
3:31 How Epstein bought his private islands
3:54 Leverage beyond the balance sheet
4:08 The reported $600 million fortune
4:20 Offshore trusts, real estate and aircraft
4:46 Why did so many give Epstein money?
5:00 DOJ file releases and global transparency
5:18 Potential civil actions ahead
